current_judgment: qwen2.5:14b with general-grammar-cleanup-001 is the adopted baseline. Won or tied across all 5 evaluation tests against phi4:14b. Preserves intended meaning while making broader cleanup edits than lore-safe lane allows. phi4:14b showed repeated interpretive normalization and semantic recasting. Metrics are qualitative approximations from comparative manual review, not structured detection sets.
next_required_decision: Test next challenger model across the 5-input evaluation set. Define a lightweight judgment rubric to make future adoption decisions more structured.
provenance_notes: false_positive_rate and surface_detection_rate are qualitative approximations from comparative manual review across 5 test inputs vs phi4:14b. Interpreted as: FPR = rate of unnecessary rewrite beyond grammar cleanup scope; SDR = rate of real grammar and readability issues correctly improved. No frozen labeled case pack exists. Values are not equivalent to benchmark-derived detection metrics.
